homepage.title: mktour - chess tournament management
homepage.description: create and manage chess tournaments with swiss, round robin, single elimination and double elimination formats. free and open-source.

signIn.title: sign in
signIn.description: sign in to mktour with your lichess account

about.title: about mktour
about.description: open-source chess tournament management platform built by chess enthusiasts

faq.description: frequently asked questions about mktour chess tournament platform

Descriptions.club: your chess club dashboard. here you can manage your players, events and other club settings
Descriptions.tournaments: here are all the tournaments related to you. both, where you played and which were organized by your clubs
Descriptions.about us: mktour is an open-source project. here you can learn more about team and the app
Descriptions.profile: your page with clubs, stats and more

Descriptions.all clubs: explore clubs and their events, join new communities
Descriptions.new club: create new chess club right here
Descriptions.FAQ: learn how to use all mktour's cool features
Descriptions.contact: reach us with questions, ideas, hiring offers and whatever else

Empty.players: there are no players in this club yet
Empty.tournaments: there are no tournaments in this club yet

Profile.noClubs: not a member of any club yet

Player.name: name
Player.claim confirmation: you are gonna send application. as soon as admins confirm it, player will be associated with your account
Player.cancel affiliation by user description: you'll disconnect your account from this player. they won't show on your profile, and you won't be able to set their results
Player.cancel affiliation by club description: you are going to remove this player's affiliation to the club.

Stats.h2hEmpty: no games against other players yet
Stats.h2hEmptyForPlayer: seems like you never played against {player} yet
Stats.h2hEmptyForClub: seems like you never played against {player} in {club} yet

Errors.CANNOT_LEAVE_ONLY_CLUB: you can not leave the only club you are in
Errors.CLUB_NOT_CREATED: sorry! some error happened. the club wasn't created
Errors.CONCURRENT_GAME_RESULT_UPDATE: sorry! someone else updated this result at the same time
Errors.EMPTY_CLUB_EXISTS: you already have a club with no finished tournaments. you can edit it instead of creating a new one
Errors.FORBIDDEN: sorry! you are not allowed to do that
Errors.INCOMPLETE_GAMES: enter results for every game before finishing the tournament
Errors.INVALID_PRE_START_WITHDRAWN_UNIT: withdrawn player is invalid before tournament start
Errors.INVALID_UNIT_IN_PAIRING: invalid player in pairing. try reloading the page
Errors.LICHESS_TEAM_ALREADY_LINKED: sorry, this team is already here:
Errors.LONG_CLUB_NAME: too long for a chess club name
Errors.MAX_NICKNAME_LENGTH: nickname must be at most 30 characters long
Errors.MIN_NICKNAME_LENGTH: nickname must be at least 3 characters long
Errors.MIN_STARTING_RATING: don't be so humble, start at least with 800
Errors.NOT_CLUB_ADMIN: sorry! you are not a club admin
Errors.NOT_DOUBLES_TOURNAMENT: this is not a doubles tournament
Errors.NOT_ENOUGH_TOURNAMENT_UNITS: not enough players to start the tournament
Errors.NOT_LICHESS_TEAM_ADMIN: you are not an admin of this lichess team
Errors.NOT_SOLO_TOURNAMENT: this is not a solo tournament
Errors.NOT_SWISS_TOURNAMENT: this is not a swiss tournament
Errors.NOT_TOURNAMENT_ORGANIZER: sorry! you are not the tournament organizer
Errors.NO_OTHER_CLUB_CO_OWNER: you can not leave the only club you are a co-owner of
Errors.PLAYER_ALREADY_IN_PAIR: one of selected players is already in a team
Errors.PLAYER_ALREADY_IN_UNIT: this player is already in the tournament
Errors.PLAYER_HAS_TOURNAMENTS: sorry! can't delete a player who's in a tournament. you'd have to delete the tournament first
Errors.PLAYER_RESULT_SETTING_DISABLED: club admins disabled player result submissions
Errors.RELATION_EXISTS: this user is already a club manager
Errors.SHORT_CLUB_NAME: too short for a chess club name
Errors.TEAM_PLAYERS_SHOULD_BE_DIFFERENT: team must consist of two different players
Errors.TOURNAMENT_NOT_STARTED: first you need to start the tournament to then set game results
Errors.UNAUTHENTICATED: sorry! you need to sign in
Errors.UNIT_NICKNAME_TAKEN: team nickname is already used in this club
Errors.USERID_NOT_FOUND_IN_CONTEXT: user id not found in context
Errors.WITHDRAWAL_REDUCES_ROUNDS_BELOW_CURRENT: can't withdraw player because too few rounds remains
Errors.ZERO_CLUBS: every user must have at least one club
Errors.POSSIBLE_PLAYERS_NOT_LOADED: error happened while loading club players
Errors.TOURNAMENT_INFO_NOT_LOADED: couldn't get tournament info from server
Errors.TOURNAMENT_UNITS_NOT_LOADED: sorry! couldn't get added players from the server
Errors.WEBSOCKET_FAILED: live-server error. sorry! no realtime updates this time
Errors.WEBSOCKET_MESSAGE_NOT_SENT: sorry! realtime server couldn't forward this event to other viewers
Errors.PASTE_DISABLED: you have to do it yourself

Settings.name: name
Settings.confirmation body: all players and tournaments will be deleted. if you're completely sure, type the name of the club you are deleting
Settings.allow players set results: allow players to set game results
Settings.allow players set results description: users can submit results in their own games
Settings.no affiliated users: no users linked to your club found. start typing to search all mktour users

Notifications.empty: claims to moderate tournaments, to link players to users and other club related notifications

Notification.affiliation_request_rejected: <userLink>{user}</userLink>'s request to link with <playerLink>{player}</playerLink> was rejected

New.name: name
New.description placeholder:
tell something about your club...

p.s it's useful to mention here, how to contact admins
New.club not saved: sorry! server error happened, club wasn't saved

forward to empty.message: it seems that you have a club with no finished tournaments: {club}. you can just edit it!

New.club not created: sorry! some error happened. the club wasn't created

Toasts.ws error: live-server error. sorry! no realtime updates this time
Toasts.user deleted: your profile has been deleted completely
Toasts.zero clubs error: every user must have at least one club
Toasts.tmt-not-started error: first you need to start the tournament to then set game results
Toasts.ws message error: sorry! realtime server couldn't forward this event to other viewers
Toasts.incomplete games: enter results for every game before finishing the tournament
Toasts.player has tournaments: sorry! can't delete a player who's in a tournament. you'd have to delete the tournament first
Toasts.player result setting disabled: club admins disabled player result submissions
Toasts.rounds number decreased automatically: number of rounds was automatically decreased to {roundsNumber}

UserSettings.name: name
UserSettings.confirmation body: this confirmation will immediately delete your profile completely. there is no way back! if you're completely sure type your nickname below
UserSettings.checkbox2: delete every club i own (with all players)
UserSettings.do it yourself: you have to do it yourself

Tokens.description:
api tokens allow you to make authenticated requests
to mktour api. it gives full access to your account
Tokens.name: name
Tokens.modal description: this token will only be shown once. please copy it and store it securely. you will not be able to see it again.
Tokens.modal warning: warning: this token gives full access to your account. do not share it with anyone.

Main.confirmation body: all results and scores are going to be deleted. the tournament will get to 'not started' state

Delete.title: delete tournament
Delete.confirmation body: the tournament will be permanently deleted

Round.add two players: add at least two players to see generated round

start tournament.title: start tournament?
start tournament.description: you have to start tournament before saving results

Table.added players error: sorry! couldn't get added players from the server

AddPlayer.name: name
AddPlayer.possible players error: error happened while loading club players
AddPlayer.no players:
nobody here yet!
go add some new people
AddPlayer.team nickname taken: team nickname is already used in this club
AddPlayer.player already in team: one of selected players is already in a team
AddPlayer.not enough players for team: you need at least two available players to create a team

Tournaments.no tournaments: you don't have any tournaments yet

MakeTournament.server error: sorry! server error happened, couldn't make tournament
MakeTournament.name: name

Home.big text 2: organize any chess tournament the easy way

TeamJoinToaster.user refused: too bad... we hope you join us one day!
TeamJoinToaster.joined successfuly: yeee, now you're in the team!
TeamJoinToaster.toast message: in case you experience any difficulties while using our app, please describe the problem at <lichess>our lichess team </lichess> forum. do you want to join the team, where you can reach us any time?

GlobalSearch.search dialog description: here you can find any club, tournament or mktour user

About.title: about mktour
About.intro: mktour is a free, open-source platform designed for organizing offline chess tournaments. it's fast, simple and clear

contact.title: get in touch
contact.lichess_desc: there is a forum for your questions
